subject: physics
title: 19M.1.SL.TZ1.4
question_html:
A stone is thrown downwards from the edge of a cliff with a speed of 5.0 m s–1. It hits the ground 2.0 s later. What is the height of the cliff?

A. 20 m

B. 30 m

C. 40 m

D. 50 m
examiners_html: This question was well answered by the majority of candidates and had a high discrimination index.
